message:
feat: Add compile-time string literal comparison folding

Fold string literal comparisons at compile time:
- "hello" == "hello" → true (no runtime comparison)
- "hello" == "world" → false (no runtime comparison)

This leverages metal0's unique position of seeing both high-level
Python semantics and low-level codegen - we know string literals
are immutable, so identical literals can be folded at compile time.
